title: Application For Birth Certificate
description: Register a timely or delayed Certificate of Live Birth (COLB) with the City Civil Registrar.
schedule: Monday 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM (Flag Raising from 8:00 AM - 9:00 AM) | Tuesday to Friday, 8:30 AM to 5:00 PM (Morning Prayer 8:00 AM - 8:30 AM) | No noon break
whoMayAvail: Concerned person of legal age, parents, guardians, attendant-at-birth, barangay secretary and civil registrar agents.

items: Duly accomplished Certificate of Live Birth, MF-102, in 4 copies
Duly accomplished Muslim/IP Attachment - MF-102 for Muslim/Indigenous Peoples, in 3 copies
If legitimate child, marriage contract of parents

If illegitimate child, Duly accomplished Affidavit of Acknowledgement/ Paternity executed by the father and mother (personal appearance) at the back of the COLB, for illegitimate child and Affidavit to use Surname of the father (AUSF)
Duly accomplished Certificate of Live Birth (COLB) MF-102, in 4 copies
Duly accomplished Muslim/IP attachment MF-102 for Muslim/Indigenous Peoples, in 3 copies
NSO Negative Certificate
Barangay Captain Certification, if born at home
Duly accomplished Affidavit of Acknowledgement/ Paternity executed by the father and mother (personal appearance) at the back of the COLB, for illegitimate child
Duly accomplished Affidavit of Delayed Registration executed by the informant at the back of the COLB
Community Tax Cert. No., date, place of issue
Approval of Indorsement to City Prosecutor’s Office
Posting period of 10 days
Sworn Affidavit of 2 disinterested persons attesting to the facts and circumstances of birth
Any 2 documents (public or private) showing the facts and circumstances of birth
Affidavit to Use the Surname of the Father (AUSF), if illegitimate child

procedures.clientAction: Submit duly accomplished COLB or submit for interview as to the facts and circumstances of birth and comply with all requirements
procedures.providerAction: Receive and review duly accomplished COLB and documentary evidences or prepare COLB to be accomplished by the concerned signatories
procedures.duration: 10 mins If with prepared COLB, 30 mins If without prepared COLB

procedures.clientAction: Wait for the approval and release of duty registered COLB if timely registered
procedures.providerAction: Process the registration and release of approved COLB, if timely registered.

procedures.clientAction: In case of delayed registration, hand carry the referral letter prepared by CCR to the City Prosecutor for appropriate action, get it back and submit it to CCR
procedures.providerAction: In case of delayed registration, prepare referral letter addressed to the City Prosecutor and request the application/client to hand carry it to the said office, after which, submit same CCR.

procedures.clientAction: You wait...
procedures.providerAction: Post the application for 10 consecutive days in CCR Bulletin Board

procedures.clientAction: Wait for the release of late COLB
procedures.providerAction: Process the registration and release of approved delayed registered COLB on the 11th day.

title: Application For Business Permit
description: Requirements and guidelines for securing a new business permit or renewing an existing one at the City Mayor's Office.
schedule: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Daily excluding Saturdays, Sundays and Holidays. On Mondays, provision of services starts after flag raising. No noon break.

items: DTI Registration
Barangay Clearance (Location of Business)
Occupancy Permit (City Engineer's Office)
Lease Contract (If business space is rented)
Compliance of Zoning Ordinance (if applicable)
SEC Registration and Article of Incorporation
CDA Certificate for Cooperative
Barangay Clearance (Location of Business)
Occupancy Permit (City Engineer's Office)
Lease Contract (If business space is rented)
Compliance of Zoning Ordinance (if applicable)
Basis for computing taxes, fees and charges (Income Tax Return)
Barangay Clearance (Location of Business)

procedures.clientAction: Secure Application for Business Permit form and checklist of requirements as to type of business applied for.
procedures.providerAction: Issue Application of Business Permit form and checklist. Instruct applicant how to comply with requirements.

procedures.clientAction: Receive, fill up and submit application form and all requirements.
procedures.providerAction: Receive the whole documents. Verify and check information on the Application for Business Permit form and the requirements.

procedures.clientAction: Wait while the encoding/processing is going on.
procedures.providerAction: Encode all the data in the computer and print UNIFIED Form. Transmit information (applicant’s data) to City Engineer’s Office for assessment of regulatory fees.
procedures.personInCharge: Mila Mahinay / Victoria de Guzman / Resa Derama

procedures.clientAction: Proceed to Business Tax & Fees Division of City Treasurer’s Office for assessment and payment of business tax.
procedures.providerAction: Advice client to proceed to City Treasurer’s Office for assessment of business taxes and other fees.
procedures.personInCharge: Mila Mahinay / Victoria de Guzman / Resa Derama

procedures.clientAction: Submit all documents, together with the Official Receipt to Permits & Licensing Division.
procedures.providerAction: Check the compliance of requirements including the Bureau of Fire Protection Certificate.

procedures.clientAction: Wait for the processing of the business permit.
procedures.providerAction: Print Business Permit and countersign the Business Permit as to recommending approval.

procedures.clientAction: Receive and review duly approved Business Permit and corresponding Business Plate Number.
procedures.providerAction: Forward Business Permit to the City Mayor for approval. Release the Business Permit with corresponding Business Plate Number.

procedures.clientAction: Affix signature in the logbook as proof of receipt.
procedures.providerAction: Require applicant to affix signature in the logbook as proof of receipt.

title: Application For Building Permit
description: Requirements and procedures for securing a building permit for constructions and renovations.
schedule: Monday 9:00 A.M - 5:00 P.M. (Flag Raising from 8:00 A.M. - 9:00A.M.) Tuesday to Friday, 8:30 A.M. to 5:00 P.M. (Morning Prayer 8:00 to 8:30 A.M.) No noon break

items: 2 copies of Lot Plan with certification from a Geodetic Engineer that the proposed building will not encroach the adjoining properties
7 sets of Building Plans (Structural, Electrical, Plumbing) with Site Development Plan indicating the set-back/yard distances at the front sides and with Perspective at page 1 of every set
4 copies of Bill of Materials and Cost Estimates
4 copies of Specification documents
4 copies of Title of Property (Transfer Certificate of Title), certified true copy
4 copies of Deed of Absolute Sale/Lease Contract/Contact to Sell
Consent and Authority from the owner if the TCT is not in the name of the applicant
4 copies of latest Tax declaration (Please refer to City Assessor’s Office for the issuance of the Certification)
4 copies of current Tax receipt of Real Property Tax payment
1 copy of Construction log Book
2 copies of Structural Design Computation w/ Seismic Analysis which conforms to the latest NSCP-for 2 storeys and above or 1 storey w/ attic/mezzanine/roof deck/penthouse
2 copies of Plate Load Test Analysis-for 3 storeys or 2 storeys w/ attic/mezzanine/roof deck/penthouse
2 copies of Environment Compliance Certificate/Environment and
Natural Resources (ENRO) Clearance-for communication towers and gas depot
1 copy of Department of Labor and Employment (DOLE) Clearance for Industrial Buildings
Duly filled-out and Notarized Building permit Application Forms (and Ancillary Permit Forms: Electrical, Mechanical, Plumbing, Fencing).
Area of Building = 83 sq. m.
Line and Grade - P 470.00
Building - P 671.00
Plumbing - P 112.00
Electrical - P 280.00
Fence - P 132.00

procedures.clientAction: Secure application forms and checklist Fill-up application forms (Building, Electrical, Mechanical, Plumbing forms)
procedures.providerAction: Issue application forms and checklist

procedures.clientAction: Submit application form w/ all requirements
procedures.providerAction: Receive duly filled-out Building Permit application and all the listed requirements. Inform client of the schedule for inspection.
If application submitted lacks some requirements the application is returned to concerned party for compliance
Conduct inspection of site, evaluate/assess and process the Building Permit application

procedures.clientAction: Receive the plans and technical documents for correction
procedures.providerAction: If technical deficiencies are found, returned the plans & technical documents for correction

procedures.clientAction: Follow-up status of the application and submit required clearances (Zoning, Fire Safety Clearance, DENR, DOLE)
procedures.providerAction: Receive the required clearances. Receive the corrected plans and documents for review and re-evaluation

procedures.clientAction: Receive the order of payment
procedures.providerAction: Issue the order of payment
procedures.fee: Per assessment and schedule of Fees stipulated in the NBC

procedures.clientAction: Pay the corresponding fees at the City Treasurer’s Office
procedures.providerAction: Receive and record OR payments
procedures.fee: Refer to Box A in the requirements tab

procedures.providerAction: Final Evaluation and approval of the application

procedures.clientAction: Receive the approved Building Permit
procedures.providerAction: Release the approved Building Permit

title: Application For Temporary Electrical Permit
description: Requirements for securing a temporary electrical permit for indigents.
schedule: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Daily (No noon break) excluding Saturdays, Sundays and Holidays. On Mondays provision of services starts after flag raising.
whoMayAvail:
1. Indigents who need temporary electrical connection at their residences
2. Indigents not covered by Iligan City Resettlement Projects

items: Filled up forms
Certificate of Indigency from applicant's barangay
Photo copies of Land Title & Tax Declaration

procedures.clientAction: Present Certificate of Indigency and Tax Declaration.
procedures.providerAction: Require Certificate of Indigency and Tax Declaration from the applicant

procedures.clientAction: Submit requirement as required
procedures.providerAction: Issue list of requirements & forms to be filled-up and complied. Instruct applicant how how to fill-up the forms.

procedures.clientAction: Pay the Temporary Electrical Permit Fee at the cashier.
procedures.providerAction: Inform client to pay to the cashier of the Temporary Electrical Permit Fee for processing the request.

title: Application for Locational Clearance Prior to Building Permit
description: Requirements for securing a locational clearance prior to applying for a building permit.
schedule: Monday 9:00 A.M - 5:00 P.M. (Flag Raising from 8:00 A.M. - 9:00A.M.) | Tuesday to Friday, 8:30 A.M. to 5:00 P.M. (Morning Prayer 8:00 to 8:30 A.M.) | No noon break

items: Filled up Zoning Application form
Notarized Zoning Application
Money Order form from Post Office

requirements.groupName: Zoning / Locational Clearance Schedule of Fees
items: Single Residential (P100,000 and Below): P200 x .01
Single Residential (Over P100,000 to P200,000): P400
Single Residential (Over P200,000): P500 + 1/10 of 1% in excess of P200,000
Apartment/Townhouses (P500,000 and Below): P1,000
Apartment/Townhouses (Over P500,000 to P2M): P1,500
Apartment/Townhouses (Over P2M): P2,500 + 1/10 of 1% of cost in excess of P2M
Dormitories (P2M and below): P2,500
Dormitories (Over P2M): P2,500 + 1/10 of 1% of cost in excess of P2M
Institutional (Below P2M): P2,000
Institutional (Over P2M): P2,000 + 1/10 of 1% of cost in excess of P2M
Commercial/Industrial (Below P100,000): P1,000
Commercial/Industrial (Over P100,000 - P500,000): P1,500
Commercial/Industrial (Over P500,000 - P1M): P2,000
Commercial/Industrial (Over P1M - P2M): P3,000
Commercial/Industrial (Over P2M): P5,000 + 1/10 of 1% of cost in excess of P2M
Special Uses/Projects (Below P2M): P5,000
Special Uses/Projects (Over P2M): P5,000 + 1/10 of 1% of cost in excess of P2M

procedures.clientAction: Customer/Applicant to apply Zoning Clearance with complete document in support to the application such as building permit form with set of technical drawings, land ownership and other documents.
procedures.providerAction: Receive and Evaluate building permit documents.
procedures.fee: Varies (See Schedule of Fees in Requirements tab)

procedures.providerAction: If no site inspection, issue zoning application form and assess zoning fees. If document is not complete, return the document to applicant/Customer. If with site inspection (prior assessment of zoning fees).

procedures.clientAction: Fill up Zoning Application forms and notarize. Pay Zoning Fees in a form of PMO/Cheques to bank/post office.
Submit notarized application forms / Zoning Fees in a form of PMO/Cheques.
procedures.providerAction: Process the Application and forward to DZA for decision/approval.
Approval / disapproval of application.
Release Building Permit to Client.

title: Application For Traffic Clearance
description: Requirements for securing a traffic clearance from the Iligan City Traffic and Parking Management Office.
department: Iligan City Traffic and Parking Management Office
schedule: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Daily excluding Saturdays, Sundays and Holidays. On Mondays provision of services starts after flag raising. No noon break.
whoMayAvail: All government agencies, LGUs, GOCC, and other government instrumentalities and owners or operators/drivers of public and private conveyances including individual who may have concern with traffic.

items: Affidavit of loss three (3) copies, one (1) original and two (2) photocopies.
Police Blotter Report Fee (Official Receipt issued by CTO)
Certificate Fee (Official Receipt issued by CTO)
Police Blotter Extract
Supporting documents: (Not Compulsory)
Deed of Sale
Photocopy of OR/CR
SPA
Authorization Letter

procedures.clientAction: Fill out Iligan City Government Registry Form and present required documents.
procedures.providerAction: Receive/Check Requirements: Official Receipt for Traffic Clearance Fee, Official Receipt for Police Blotter Report Fee, Affidavit of Loss (3 copies), and Police Blotter Report.
procedures.personInCharge: Information Desk Officer Incharge / TCT Case In-charge

procedures.clientAction: Proceed to secure Official Receipt.
procedures.providerAction: If the requirement is complete, advise client to proceed at the Collection Services Division, City Treasurer’s Office, IBJT, East Bldg., Tambo, Hinaplanon, Iligan City. Process payment and issue corresponding Official Receipt.
procedures.fee: Certification Fee Php 50.00, Police Report Fee Php 50.00

procedures.clientAction: Return to ICTPMO and submit official receipt. Wait for the process and further advice from the service provider.
procedures.providerAction: If no pending traffic violations/cases and information is accurate, encode and print. Review Data/Findings, affix signature/initial on the copy of certification, and segregate. Affix signature on the certification. Advise client to proceed to PNP Traffic Unit for the next step.
procedures.personInCharge: Information Desk Officer Incharge / Data Encoder / TCT Case Incharge / Chief, ICTPMO Admin In-charge

procedures.clientAction: Follow advice if documents are lacking.
procedures.providerAction: If the client is lacking requirements (e.g., Affidavit of Loss): Advise client to secure one from any lawyer and provide a photocopy. If there is no Police Blotter Report, advise clients to proceed to the Police Station with jurisdiction over the lost incident.
procedures.personInCharge: Information Desk Officer Incharge / TCT Case In-charge

procedures.clientAction: Return to ICPTMO and submit requirements together with official receipt.
procedures.providerAction: Receive/Check Requirements: Official Receipt for Traffic Clearance Fee, Official Receipt for Police Blotter Report Fee, Affidavit of Loss, and Police Blotter Report. Indicate in the logbook the proof of payment (official receipt) and client information.

procedures.clientAction: Wait for the data check and for further advise from the service provider.
procedures.providerAction: Verify/validate data and information based on records available. If found on record to have unsettled traffic violation/s, clients are advised to settle pending violation/s or cases; issue order of payment for the client to pay to the cashier.

procedures.clientAction: Pay to the cashier.
procedures.providerAction: Advise client to proceed at the Collection Services Division, City Treasurer’s Office, IBJT East Bldg., Tambo, Hinaplanon, Iligan City.
procedures.fee: Fines and penalties in accordance with the provision of the New Traffic Code of Iligan City

procedures.clientAction: Proceed to Iligan City Traffic Management Office and wait for processing of clearance.
procedures.providerAction: For Unsettled Traffic Violation: Receive/check proof of payment, indicate the O.R. number and amount paid, record Official Receipt Information. For Traffic Clearance: Receive/check official receipt and record information in the logbook. Encode personal details as indicated in affidavit of loss and print certification in three (3) copies.

procedures.clientAction: Wait for processing of traffic clearance.
procedures.providerAction: If no pending traffic violation/s/case and information is accurate, encode and print. Review Data/Findings and affix signature/initial on the copy of certification and segregate. Affix Signature on the certification. Advise clients to proceed to PNP Traffic Unit, Iligan City Police Office for a signature of Chief Traffic Unit.
procedures.personInCharge: Data Encoder / TCT Case Incharge / Chief, ICTPMO Admin In-charge

title: Pre-Marriage Counseling Certificate (P.D 965) - Preparation and Issuance
description: Requirements for the preparation and issuance of a Pre-Marriage Counseling Certificate (P.D 965) for couples applying for a marriage license.
department: City Mayor's Office - City Population Office
schedule: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Daily excluding Saturdays, Sundays and Holidays. On Mondays provision of services starts after flag raising. No noon break.
whoMayAvail: "Couples to be" who are applying for a Marriage License

items: Individual Residence Certificate (CEDULA) (1 original copy) - Secure from Barangay/City Hall
Passport (For Foreigners Only) - Secure from Person concerned

procedures.clientAction: Request for a schedule of Pre-Marriage counseling seminar
procedures.providerAction:
a. Give logbook to client
b. Conduct interview for profiling
procedures.personInCharge: Population Program Officer I or Population Program Officer III (City Population Office, City Mayor’s Office)

procedures.clientAction: Pay for PreMarriage Counseling (PMC) fee
procedures.providerAction: Inform couple about the PMC fee and instruct to pay to the deputized collector
procedures.personInCharge: Population Program Officer I or Population Program Officer III (City Population Office, City Mayor’s Office)

procedures.clientAction: Accomplish and submit Marriage Expectation Inventory (MEI) questionnaire
procedures.providerAction:
a. Ask couple to answer MEI questionnaire
b. Receive accomplished MEI and review answers
procedures.personInCharge: Population Program Officer I or Population Program Officer III (City Population Office, City Mayor's Office)

procedures.clientAction: Receive schedule of PreMarriage Orientation
procedures.providerAction: Provide couple specific date of pre marriage counseling schedule
procedures.personInCharge: Population Program Officer I or Population Program Officer III (City Population Office, City Mayor’s Office)

title: Granting of Blood Request
description: Requirements and guidelines for indigent residents of Iligan City to request blood assistance.
schedule: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Daily excluding Saturdays, Sundays and Holidays. On Mondays provision of services starts after flag raising. No noon break.

items: Signed Doctor's Blood Request (1 Original copy) - Secure from Hospital
Certificate of Indigency from Barangay (1 Original Copy) - Secure from Barangay where the patient resides
CMO Referral Slip (1 Original Copy) - Secure from City Mayor's Office - Administrative Division

procedures.clientAction: Proceed and submit requirements
procedures.providerAction: Receive and check the completeness of requirements
procedures.personInCharge: Administrative Aide V City Mayor’s Office

procedures.clientAction: When Securing Official Receipt:
procedures.providerAction: Provide logbook to client
procedures.personInCharge: Administrative Aide V City Mayor’s Office

procedures.clientAction: Receive the document with the city seal to be signed by the City Mayor at the City Mayor’s Office Extension
procedures.providerAction: Release the Mayor’s Clearance and instruct client to proceed to the City Mayor’s Office Office Extension
procedures.personInCharge: Administrative Aide V City Mayor’s Office
